description: PropFuel (now part of re:Members) API credentials. PropFuel is an association engagement platform — the public marketing site does not document an API publicly, so the exact endpoint shape and auth header name should be confirmed with PropFuel before enabling this connector against a production tenant. The schema below assumes the common SaaS pattern: a per-tenant BaseURL plus a bearer/API-key token. Update the connector and this schema once PropFuel publishes formal API documentation.

BaseURL.title: PropFuel API Base URL
BaseURL.description: Full base URL for the customer's PropFuel API tenant (no trailing slash). Example: https://api.propfuel.com/v1 or https://{tenant}.propfuel.com/api/v1. Confirm exact format with PropFuel — the marketing site does not publish a public developer portal.

ApiKey.title: API Key
ApiKey.description: PropFuel-issued API key. Sent as `Authorization: Bearer {ApiKey}` by the connector. Confirm with PropFuel whether your tenant uses Bearer, X-API-Key, or another header — adjust the connector's BuildHeaders if necessary.
